rationale: C5 and C6 are byte-identical to Round 7. The Round 7 frontmatter bump (0.1.6 -> 0.1.7) adds 0 tokens (verified via o200k_base('0.1.6') == o200k_base('0.1.7')), so body_tokens stays at 2020; references_dir is unchanged (same 5 .md files referenced); neighbor glob matches the same 23 lark-* SKILL.md paths. Both C5 and C6 are deterministic static computations — re-running count_tokens.skill_md_context_rot_risk and count_tokens.skill_md_scope_overlap_score yields byte-identical output.

c6_scope_overlap_score.method: max Jaccard similarity across 23 neighbor SKILL.md descriptions under /root/.claude/skills/lark-*/SKILL.md

verification_method: Comparing the round_7 c5_derivation.json + c6_overlap_pairs.json inputs to round_8 re-run inputs: SKILL.md body byte-identical (only frontmatter version field moved from '0.1.6' to '0.1.7'); references_dir unchanged (same 5 files); neighbor glob unchanged (same 23 lark-* SKILL.md paths). Deterministic computation -> byte-identical output.
